commands.description: Print values to stdout, space-separated, with newline.
Add a message to the scrolling on-screen debug console.
Add a colored message to the scrolling on-screen debug console.
Toggle the system performance monitor (FPS, RAM).
Toggle the system performance monitor (FPS, RAM).
Same as PRINT (newline after output).
Print values space-separated without newline.
Alias of CURVE â€” current + (target-current)/divisor (divisor clamped to >= 1)
Alias of MATH.APPROACH â€” move current toward target by at most maxDelta without overshooting
Alias of MATH.LERP
Shortest signed angle from a to b in degrees (alias of MATH.ANGLEDIFF)
DBPro-style: move current toward target by (target-current)/speed per call
Like CURVEVALUE for degrees (360 wrap)
Ken Perlin smootherstep(edge0, edge1, x); clamps then 6t^5-15t^4+10t^3
Same as SMOOTHERSTEP
Horizontal distance on XZ: hypot(x2-x1, z2-z1); ignores Y
Same as HDIST
Squared HDIST for comparisons without sqrt
Same as HDISTSQ
Yaw radians from flat direction (dx, dz); matches MOVEX/MOVEZ convention
Same as YAWFROMXZ
Heading in degrees [0,360) on XZ from (x1,z1) to (x2,z2)
Same as ANGLETO
Shortest signed angle difference b-a in radians
Same as ANGLEDIFFRAD
2D Euclidean distance; alias of DISTANCE2D under MATH
Same as DIST2D
Squared 2D distance
Same as DISTSQ2D
Camera-relative world X on XZ plane: yaw#, forward#, strafe#
Camera-relative world Z on XZ plane: yaw#, forward#, strafe#
Same as MOVEX(yaw,f,s)*speed*dt â€” world X delta this frame
Same as MOVEZ(yaw,f,s)*speed*dt â€” world Z delta this frame
currentX + MOVEX(yaw,1,0)*dist â€” yaw in radians (XZ forward step)
currentZ + MOVEZ(yaw,1,0)*dist â€” yaw in radians
RND() float in [0,1); RND(n) int in [0,n-1]; RND(lo,hi) inclusive int range.
Inclusive random integer in [min, max]
Same as RND(min, max) â€” inclusive integer range
Same as RAND
Inclusive int range â€” same as RND(lo, hi)
Inline conditional returning a string; both branches evaluated
When true, TERRAIN.DRAW skips drawing so RENDER.FRAME still polls OS events during mesh builds
Current loading-mode flag from WINDOW.SETLOADINGMODE
Alias of WINDOW.SETTITLE
Resize window (w,h); depth reserved; mode bit0 = high-DPI flag
Resize window (w,h) with defaults: reserved depth and high-DPI mode
Pre-window-open MSAA sample hint (alias of WINDOW.SETMSAA); 2+ enables GPU MSAA hint
Screen-space ambient occlusion (alias of EFFECT.SSAO enable)
Full-screen post shader (alias of POST.ADDSHADER)
Alias of POST.ADDSHADER â€” full-screen post shader for the render pipeline
Scales frame delta (0 = treated as 1); use for slow-mo / fast-forward with GAME.DT and TIME.DELTA
Current time scale (0 stored reads as 1 for delta)
Sphere vs box top: landing centre Y or 0.0 if no landing
Best BOXTOPLAND snap Y over count boxes (parallel float arrays)
Alias of LANDBOXES
MOVESTEPX/Z combined â€” 2-float array [dx,dz]; ERASE when done
Fog RGB, near, far, density â€” FOG.* + WORLD.FOGDENSITY
POST.BLOOM threshold; intensity defaults to 1
POST.BLOOM threshold and intensity
Alias for CAMERA.BEGIN: 3D camera handle (heap) from CAMERA.MAKE / CreateCamera
Alias for CAMERA.END (no arguments)
Builds a coarse walkability grid from a terrain heightmap (slope limit); returns nav handle and caches per terrain for NAV.GETPATH
A* path on last NAV.BAKE for this terrain (start/end XZ; Y sampled from terrain)
True if NAV.GETPATH would return a valid path
Moves an entity along a PATH handle toward waypoints at speed (world units/sec)
Alias of CAMERA.MAKE â€” short Blitz-style 3D camera constructor
Alias of CAMERA.MAKE â€” returns a Camera3D handle
Point light at (x,y,z) with RGB (0â€“255 or 0â€“1) and intensity (energy)
Directional light: direction vector (dx,dy,dz), RGB, energy â€” direction is normalized
Spot: position, target point, RGB, outer cone degrees, energy
Blitz-style: type 1=directional, 2=point, 3=spot; optional parent entity# stored for future attachment
Alias of LIGHT.SETRANGE
Alias of LIGHT.SETCOLOR (RGB)
Alias of LIGHT.ENABLE
EntityRef capsule primitive (radius#, height#); draw matches Jolt capsule when using ENTITY.ADDPHYSICS capsule
Spritesheet layout: columns x rows of equal frames
Select atlas frame index (0-based)
TEXTURE.LOAD + SETGRID in one call

Advance all playing atlas animations (optional dt via overload)
Source-rectangle scroll speeds for sampled UVs
Shader-side distortion amount hint
Alias of TEXTURE.FROMIMAGE; respects IMAGE.SETFILTER when set

Alias of MESH.MAKECUBE
Alias of MESH.MAKESPHERE
Two-key axis: -1, 0, or 1 (negKey vs posKey)
Input.Axis(neg,pos)*DEGPERSEC(degPerSec,dt) â€” radians this frame
Alias of INPUT.AXISDEG â€” orbit / yaw delta this frame
2-float array [forward, strafe] from two Axis pairs; ERASE when done
Alias of INPUT.MOUSEDELTAX
Alias of INPUT.MOUSEDELTAY

Alias of INPUT.MOUSEWHEELMOVE (Input.MouseWheel() style)
Warp OS cursor to client pixel (x,y); pair with CURSOR.DISABLE for game-style recenter
Glob files matching prefix (e.g. assets/water_*.png) sorted by name
Animated GIF to ImageSequence (cumulative frames)
Packed pixel color (host byte order; typically ARGB-style int)
Raylib texture filter applied on IMAGE.TOTEXTURE / TEXTURE.FROMIMAGE

Professional: Scan all active handles and print to diagnostics.
Professional: List all registered built-in commands.
Write string to file without appending a newline.
Write string to file and append a newline.

COLOR.HSV(index, total) â€” evenly spaced hues on the wheel

True if path exists on disk (same idea as UTIL.FILEEXISTS)
Manual frame index (strip / DEFANIM); stops SPRITE.PLAY range playback
Animate frames start..end at speed (frames/sec); call SPRITE.UPDATEANIM with Time.Delta()
Pivot offset in pixels (subtracted from draw position)

Alias of CAMERA.YAW.
Enable/disable mouse contribution to CAMERA.ORBIT (entity) orbit-follow.
If true (default), mouse orbit only while right button is held; if false, mouse moves orbit without RMB.
Raylib key codes for orbit yaw (0 disables that side).

Keyboard orbit yaw rate in radians per second.

Alias of CAMERA.WORLDTOSCREEN â€” world point to screen [sx,sy]
World to screen using active CAMERA.BEGIN 3D camera; returns float array [sx,sy]
Unproject screen x,y with depth along view ray (active 3D camera); returns [wx,wy,wz]
Mouse position through Camera2D; float array [wx,wy]

0/1 or perspective/orthographic â€” alias-friendly CAMERA.SETPROJECTION

Locks translation/rotation for a body. axis_flags: 1=X, 2=Y, 4=Z (linear), 8, 16, 32 (angular).
Sets linear and angular damping (air resistance).
Enables/disables Continuous Collision Detection for fast moving objects.
Creates a hinge joint between two bodies at (px,py,pz) around axis (ax,ay,az).
Creates a point-to-point (ball and socket) joint between two bodies at (px,py,pz).
Destroys a physics joint/constraint.
Optional initial gravity (gx#, gy#); same effect as SETGRAVITY after start.

World XZ step from camera yaw: forward#/strafe# are deltas (typically speed*dt*input); camera is a Camera3D handle.
Same as ENTITY.MOVECAMERARELATIVE.

Horizontal walk velocity (units/s) from camera XZ strafe basis (eye→target on ground). forwardAxis/strafeAxis are typically Input.Axis −1..1; preserves vertical velocity. Dot: player.MoveWithCamera(cam, …).
Exponential smoothing: current toward target using (1-exp(-smoothHz*dt)); for orbit angles

Professional: Set entity transparency (0.0=Invisible, 1.0=Solid).

Professional: Set entity blend mode (0=Alpha, 1=Additive, 2=Multiply).
